description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker with a predominantly olive green upper featuring a camouflage-like pattern and a sock-like construction. The shoe has a white, textured midsole with visible foam, and a slightly worn, off-white outsole. There are accent details including a pink tab on the side, dark green and blue overlays, and a black pull tab at the heel. The shoe appears to be made from a combination of knit textile, synthetic overlays, and rubber, with branding elements subtly integrated into the design. The overall silhouette is low-cut and streamlined, suitable for casual or urban wear.
description: A low-cut, olive green athletic sneaker with a camouflage pattern, white midsole, and pink and blue accent details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive green upper, pink tab, blue and green overlays, and white midsole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded toe, camouflage knit pattern, and lack of visible laces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features as view 0, showing the pink tab and overlays more clearly.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the black heel pull tab, green heel overlay, and white outsole.
attribute_logo: Adidas wordmark embossed on the midsole near the toe, subtle and in the same color as the midsole.
